title: DiagnosticsProviderContribution
description: Contract for diagnostics contributions emitted by DiagnosticsProvider. This is the stable boundary between domain providers and Y bundling/analyzer layers.

provider_id.description: Stable provider identifier, unique across registry.

kind.description: Contribution content kind. 'binary' is allowed but may be rejected by policy unless explicitly permitted.

path.description: Relative path inside the support bundle root. Must be normalized, no absolute paths, no '..'.

size_limit_bytes.description: Per-contribution size limit hint; enforced by bundler/registry.

content.description: Payload. For json/text/meta: UTF-8 string or JSON object. For binary: base64 string (policy may forbid).
